title: Vconic Priority & Content Update
summary: Perry Evans and Michael Donovan discussed website development, communication breakdowns, and strategic priorities, focusing on launching the website and LinkedIn content. Michael Donovan will provide a staging version of the website for Perry's feedback and prepare LinkedIn assets, while addressing communication gaps regarding directives and priorities.

decisions.description: Michael Donovan will provide a visual, password-protected staging version of the website for Perry Evans to review.

Perry Evans will assess the staging website version and decide whether to dedicate three weeks to the website with a focus on LinkedIn, or spend the next week iterating on the website for a refined draft.
Michael Donovan will have LinkedIn assets ready to align with Vinnie's priority for immediate launch and social media development.
LinkedIn project is put in a secondary stage, focusing on hero images, profile banners, and post templates.

actionItems.task: Send a link to the staging version of the website, including the homepage, four product pages, leadership, and about page.

expectedOutcome.description: Perry Evans receives a link to the staging website.

actionItems.task: Publish the draft website behind a firewall or password protected for review.

expectedOutcome.description: Perry Evans can access and view the draft website.

actionItems.task: Focus on hero images, profile banners, and post templates to define the look and feel of LinkedIn content.

expectedOutcome.description: Templates and design language established for upcoming LinkedIn posts.

tensions: Communication breakdown between Perry Evans and Michael Donovan regarding website draft production.
Differing approaches between Vinnie (sales-focused) and Michael Donovan (structure-focused).
Vinnie's "rant" about lack of social posts and website launch timing.
Michael Donovan being given conflicting directives by Vinnie.
referencesToPast: Previous conversation between Perry Evans and Michael Donovan about producing a website draft.
Mention of past conversations around Z and Vinnie ranting about not enough social posts.
Reference to the original sanity framework wireframe.
